entry.title: Lightning Network
entry.summary: LN development and usecase Bitcoin Layer 2 (L2) - Tech behind LANG(jezik): Global (en-us) / Local (sr-latn-ba) Others (g-translate) QR Link Scaling Issues: Bitcoin base layer and Blockchain architecture in general do not scale. In order to remain decentralized enough in the long term, from a governance perspective, it needs robust structure and high redundancy. This puts practical cons...
